landing.title: Send, Receive, Invest, & Manage Your Money with Cash App
landing.text:
Send, Receive, Invest, & Manage Your Money with Cash App
Cash App Logo
Sign up
Log in
Bank* on your terms
Order a Cash App Card
Send money for free
Save for your goals
Know your money is safe
Deposit your paychecks
Pay over time with Cash App Afterpay
Save on everyday spending

Buy and sell bitcoin easily

The way money should work
From getting paid to growing what you've got, Cash App makes managing your money effortless and instant—without all the fees.
Get started
Earn, save, and do more with Cash App Green
It's easier than ever to earn our best benefits yet—higher Borrow limits, up to 3.25% savings interest, free overdraft coverage, and free withdrawals from 40k in-network ATMs.
Learn about Green
*
See legal disclaimers
Cash App Card is the debit card that works for you
No hidden or monthly fees ever
Weekly custom cash back offers
Real-time transaction alerts
Card designs you can fully personalize
Meet Cash App Card

Access cash when you need it
Explore our flexible ways to bridge the gap between payday and bill pay.
Learn more

See what's new on Cash App
Sending money was just the beginning. We're building new ways for you to pay, get rewarded, and easily manage or grow your cash on your terms.
See what's new
Make your money go even further
We make it easy to save and grow your money with up to 3.25% interest, automatic savings tools

, and the ability to turn spare change into stocks or bitcoin.

Learn how to save and grow

Sending money is fast, free, and made for you
Personalize payments with stickers and text

Send money confidently with Security Lock
Send money
Security built into every swipe, tap, and send
Since 2020, we've prevented $2 billion+ in scams—while protecting what matters with real-time monitoring, Zero Fraud Liability, and FDIC insurance, subject to terms.

The money app 59 million+ people trust

Cash App is a financial services platform, and not an FDIC-insured bank. Prepaid debit cards issued by Sutton Bank, Member FDIC. Cash App Visa® Debit Flex Cards issued by Sutton Bank, Member FDIC, and The Bancorp Bank, N.A., pursuant to a license from Visa U.S.A. Inc. See terms and conditions for the
Sutton prepaid card
,
Sutton debit flex card
, and
Bancorp debit flex card
. Offers provided by Cash App, a Block, Inc. brand. Offers not affiliated with third party merchants.
Brokerage services provided by Cash App Investing LLC, member
FINRA
/
SIPC
, subsidiary of Block, Inc. Bitcoin services provided by Block, Inc. Bitcoin services are not licensable activity in all U.S. states and territories. Block, Inc. operates in New York as Block of Delaware and is licensed to engage in virtual currency business activity by the New York State Department of Financial Services. Investing and bitcoin are non-deposit, non-bank products that are not FDIC insured and involve risk, including monetary loss. Cash App Investing does not trade bitcoin and Block, Inc. is not a member of FINRA or SIPC. For additional information, see the
Bitcoin
and
Cash App Investing
disclosures.
Additional fees for securities may apply such as regulatory fees and fees to transfer securities externally. Please see our
House Rules
for more information.
P2P services and Savings are provided by Block, Inc. and not Cash App Investing LLC.
Tax Filing Preparation services are provided by Cash App Taxes, Inc. and not Cash App Investing LLC.
Download Cash App
We and our partners may use cookies and similar technologies (“cookies”) for site performance, analytics, advertising, and more. Some are required to use our website and can’t be turned off. For more info, including how to manage your consent for optional cookies, visit
Cookie Preferences.
Cookie Preferences
When you use our online services, we and our third party partners may collect some info about you, your preferences, or your device using technologies such as cookies, pixels, and others (collectively, “cookies”). Other than technologies that are required to use our services, you can manage your preferences for certain categories as described below. Click on each category for more information.
If you don’t want to share your personal info for advertising based on your activity on other websites and services, you can turn off “Retargeting or advertising cookies” in your preferences.
Note:
These choices apply with respect to the cookies that we use on our websites. If you are a Cash App user, log into your account to manage choices associated with your Cash App account.
For more info, visit our Privacy Notice below.
Privacy Notice
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly necessary cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary to enable core services like secure login, cookie preferences, identity management, and fraud prevention. They cannot be turned off.
Performance and analytical cookies
Performance and analytical cookies
We and our third party partners may use these cookies to analyze the usage of our services; to assess their performance; to understand users’ interactions with them; to conduct testing of different service designs; and to recognize and count the number of unique users of the service. This helps us to improve our services and to plan our service capacities.
Functionality cookies
Functionality cookies
These cookies enable us to remember you have used our services before, preferences you may have indicated, and information you have provided to us to give you a customized experience.
Retargeting or Advertising cookies
Retargeting or Advertising cookies
We and our third party partners may use cookies to collect information about your online activity to show you relevant ads on third-party sites and analyze your online activity. We may be able to associate such information with other information which we collect from you once we receive it from a third party. If you reject these cookies, you may still receive ads, but they will be less personalized.

analysis.name: Cash App
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one mobile financial platform that lets consumers send, receive, invest, and manage money without hidden fees.
analysis.ideal_customer: Everyday US consumers, especially younger adults, seeking a fee-free mobile banking alternative with P2P payments, investing, and credit access in one app.

features.name: p2p money sending
features.description: Send money instantly to other Cash App users for free

features.name: p2p money receiving
features.description: Receive money from other Cash App users

features.name: cash app card
features.description: Visa debit card linked to Cash App balance with no hidden or monthly fees

features.name: custom cash back offers
features.description: Weekly rotating cash back offers personalized to the user's card

features.name: real-time transaction alerts
features.description: Instant push notifications for every card transaction

features.name: card design personalization
features.description: Fully customizable physical card designs

features.name: overdraft coverage
features.description: Free overdraft protection up to $200 on eligible accounts

features.name: borrow
features.description: Short-term loans up to $500 with no credit check

features.name: afterpay integration
features.description: Buy now, pay later at top brands via Afterpay partnership

features.name: early direct deposit
features.description: Access paycheck funds up to 2 days before the official pay date

features.name: direct deposit
features.description: Receive paychecks directly into Cash App balance

features.name: savings account
features.description: High-yield savings with up to 3.25% interest rate

features.name: automatic savings tools
features.description: Automated rules to move money into savings goals

features.name: savings goals
features.description: Named goal-based savings buckets within the app

features.name: spare change to stocks
features.description: Round-up feature that converts spare change into fractional stock purchases

features.name: spare change to bitcoin
features.description: Round-up feature that converts spare change into bitcoin purchases

features.name: stock investing
features.description: Commission-free stock and fractional share investing

features.name: bitcoin trading
features.description: Buy and sell bitcoin directly within the app

features.name: tax filing
features.description: Free federal and state tax return filing via Cash App Taxes

features.name: teen debit card
features.description: Secure debit card product designed for teenagers with parental controls

features.name: payment stickers and text
features.description: Personalize individual payment requests or sends with stickers and custom text

features.name: payment pools
features.description: Collect money from a group into a shared pool

features.name: contact sync
features.description: Sync phone contacts to quickly find and pay friends

features.name: security lock
features.description: Requires additional authentication confirmation before sending money

features.name: real-time fraud monitoring
features.description: Continuous background monitoring to detect and block fraudulent transactions

features.name: zero fraud liability
features.description: User is not held responsible for unauthorized transactions

features.name: fdic insurance
features.description: FDIC-insured balances via partner banks (Sutton Bank, The Bancorp Bank)

features.name: cash app green
features.description: Premium membership tier offering higher Borrow limits, 3.25% savings APY, free overdraft coverage, and free ATM withdrawals at 40k+ in-network ATMs

features.name: atm access
features.description: Free cash withdrawals at 40,000+ in-network ATMs (with Green tier)

features.name: scam protection
features.description: Proactive scam detection and user education tools

differentiators: Free federal and state tax filing
No hidden or monthly fees on debit card
All-in-one platform: banking, investing, bitcoin, taxes, lending in a single app

praised: "Cash App makes it so easy to manage everything—I use it for saving, splitting bills, and getting paid. It's all-in-one."
5-star Editor's Choice on the App Store
9.9M+ combined Apple App Store and Google Play reviews

pricing_signal.free_tier: P2P sending/receiving, Cash App Card, basic savings, stock and bitcoin investing, tax filing, Borrow, early direct deposit, overdraft coverage — all core features free; Cash App Green is a paid upgrade for higher limits and premium ATM/savings benefits
